content.text:
I'm ready to help you explore the moodle-proctor codebase. I understand that I'm in READ-ONLY mode and will not modify any files.

I can see this is a git repository on the `feature/harden-desktop-app` branch with several modified and untracked files. The project appears to be a proctoring system with:

- Backend services (Node.js/TypeScript)
- Docker setup
- Manual proctoring components
- AI proctoring features
- WebRTC implementation
- Room-based proctoring functionality

What would you like me to search for or analyze in this codebase? I can help you:

- Find specific files using glob patterns
- Search code content with regex
- Read and analyze file contents
- Explore the project structure
- Track down specific implementations or bugs

Just let me know what you're looking for!
